testcase.name: test_multichip_topology_candidate[blackhole-blackhole-1x4-ring]

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices) record_property = <function record_property.<locals>.append_property at 0x7a0fdba496c0>
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_topology_candidate(mesh_device, record_property): """Isolate collective decomposition, precision, link, and topology choices."""
candidate_id = os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_TOPOLOGY_CANDIDATE") if candidate_id not in TOPOLOGY_CANDIDATES: pytest.skip(f"set MULTICHIP_TOPOLOGY_CANDIDATE to one of {sorted(TOPOLOGY_CANDIDATES)}") > _run_decode_policy_candidate( mesh_device, record_property, candidate_id=candidate_id, changes=TOPOLOGY_CANDIDATES[candidate_id], control_changes=( { "optimized": replace( MultiChipConfig().optimized, explicit_sdpa_program_config=True, explicit_sdpa_compute_kernel=True, ) } if candidate_id == "bf8_explicit_sdpa" else None ), )
models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:988: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:896: in _run_decode_policy_candidate candidate_output = candidate.decode_forward(hidden, candidate_key, candidate_value, current_pos=current_pos) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:2409: in decode_forward return self._decode_forward_device_position( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:2231: in _decode_forward_device_position fused_qkv = ttnn.linear( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.linear', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.matmul.linear_t object at 0x7a0fe2617790>, preprocess_golden_function_inputs=<function default_preprocess_golden_function_inputs at 0x7a0fe21abb00>, golden_function=<function _golden_function at 0x7a0fe2018040>, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=<function default_postprocess_golden_function_outputs at 0x7a0fe21abba0>, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-2.9297e-01, 3.0273e-01, ..., -2.0117e-01, -3.8818e-02]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 8192]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 2, MeshCoordinate([0, 1]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-2.9297e-01, shape=Shape([8192, 2560]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT4_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 1, MeshCoordinate([0, 2]) ttnn.Tensor([[ 1.5625e-02, -7.8125e-03, ..., -1.5625e-02, -7.8125e-03], [ 7.8125e-03, layout=Layout::TILE)) function_kwargs = {'compute_kernel_config': <ttnn._ttnn.operations.core.WormholeComputeKernelConfig object at 0x7a0fdb960810>, 'dtype': DataType.BFLOAT16, 'memory_config': MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCastDRAMShardedProgramConfig(in0_block_w=16,per_core_M=1,per_core_N=5,fused_activation=std::nullopt)} cq_id = None, recording = False
def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)

ttnn/ttnn/decorators.py:473: RuntimeError
